name: Hindsight Memory Hooks for Codex CLI
description: Installs the Hindsight memory hooks (recall + retain + session_start) for the OpenAI Codex CLI by running the official `get-codex` installer in local mode and, when configured, pointing at an external Hindsight server via ~/.hindsight/codex.json.

installerUrl.description: URL of the upstream installer script (`get-codex`). Override only to pin to a fork or air-gapped mirror.

hindsightApiUrl.description: External Hindsight API URL. When set, ~/.hindsight/codex.json is written so the hooks connect to this server instead of starting a local hindsight-embed daemon.

hindsightApiToken.description: Bearer token for the external Hindsight API. Stored in ~/.hindsight/codex.json (mode 0600). Leave empty and set HINDSIGHT_API_TOKEN at runtime if you would rather not commit the token.

bankId.description: Override the static memory bank ID used by the hooks. Empty keeps the installer default (`codex`).

username.description: Account that owns the installed hooks and config. `automatic` resolves to $_REMOTE_USER, then `vscode`, then root.
